lint.command: ROOT="/home/realnigga/Desktop/orchestrator_erp_worktrees/ERP-38-canonical-factory-flow" && cd "$ROOT" && bash ci/lint-knowledgebase.sh && bash ci/check-architecture.sh && bash ci/check-enterprise-policy.sh && bash ci/check-orchestrator-layer.sh && python3 scripts/check_flaky_tags.py --tests-root erp-domain/src/test/java --gate gate-fast && bash scripts/guard_openapi_contract_drift.sh

blockingIssues.description: Stale setup guidance still advertises `POST /api/v1/catalog/products` as canonical stock-bearing item setup in `docs/developer/onboarding-stock-readiness/README.md`, contradicting VAL-SETUP-001 and VAL-SETUP-002.
`.factory/library/catalog-surface-consolidation.md` still identifies `/api/v1/catalog/products` as the canonical product surface, leaving future workers pointed at the retired setup host.

`docs/code-review/flows/manufacturing-inventory.md` still presents `/api/v1/accounting/catalog/products*` as the canonical accounting-aware stock-bearing setup path, so the hard-cut away from retired setup hosts is incomplete.

appliedUpdates.description: Added `erp38-targeted-setup-packaging` so setup-truth workers can run the combined packaging regression/security proof (`PackagingMaterialServiceTest`, `PackagingMappingControllerSecurityContractTest`, `PackingControllerTest`, `BulkPackingManualPackagingRegressionIT`) from the shared service catalog.
Added `openapi-refresh` with the exact `OpenApiSnapshotIT` refresh flags used by setup-truth workers so OpenAPI snapshot regeneration is no longer tribal knowledge.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a short recovered-diff procedure for features that inherit uncommitted work from crashed sessions, including how to validate inherited edits before re-entering the normal test-first loop.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature `setup-packaging-rules-contract` reused recovered worktree changes from crashed sessions and explicitly recorded a justified deviation because the skill lacked guidance for that path.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For hard-cut cleanup features, require an explicit absence search across broader shared-state surfaces (for example `docs/developer/**`, `docs/code-review/flows/**`, and `.factory/library/**`) so contradictory retired-route guidance is not left behind outside the narrow verification checklist.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature `setup-canonical-item-entrypoints` passed its scoped validation steps but scrutiny still found contradictory `/api/v1/catalog/products*` and `/api/v1/accounting/catalog/products*` guidance in `docs/developer/onboarding-stock-readiness/README.md`, `.factory/library/catalog-surface-consolidation.md`, and `docs/code-review/flows/manufacturing-inventory.md`.

rejectedObservations.observation: A separate service-catalog observation said `.factory/services.yaml` was missing packaging security-contract proof coverage for setup-truth.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate; it is fully addressed by the new `erp38-targeted-setup-packaging` command recorded in `appliedUpdates`.
